task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Beachfront Villa in Miami FL (Real Estate). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $5800000.00 and wholesale is $4640000.00. Product features: 6-bedroom Mediterranean-style villa with private beach access and infinity pool. Reference: https://www.sothebysrealty.com/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Beachfront Villa in Miami FL. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Beachfront Villa in Miami FL. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
